description:
**Milestone:** CLI Package & Polish

Update the setuplab skill definition to use the new proto.config.yaml generation and tutorial content flow. Remove the gap-based feature creation prompt in favor of the tutorial experience. Update docs/protolabs/setup-pipeline.md with the new flow. Add setuplab to the main docs navigation.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/mcp-server/plugins/automaker/commands/setuplab.md
- docs/protolabs/setup-pipeline.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] /setuplab skill uses new proto.config.yaml generation
- [ ] Tutorial content created during setup flow
- [ ] No gap-based feature creation in default flow
- [ ] Documentation reflects new pipeline
- [ ] Existing /setuplab users get the improved experience

**Complexity:** small

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: Update /setuplab skill and docs
